reference: I HAPPENED TO SEE THOSE CANDLESTICKS IN THE WINDOW OF SINGA PHUT'S SHOP THE OTHER DAY AND I MADE UP MY MIND TO BUY THEM WHEN I HAD A CHANCE
text: i happened to see those candlesticks in the window of singafutt's shop the other day and i may have my mind to buy them when i had a chance the other day and i may have my mind to buy them when i had a chance
